description: QuantNeon (Instagram killer) + QuantEdits (CapCut killer) + QuantMax (TikTok+Tinder+Omegle killer) deep page-level screens with full interactions - profile grids, story viewer, explore page, timeline editor, asset library, vertical video feed, swipe cards, random video chat
steps: QuantNeon: Create apps/quantneon/src/pages/story-viewer.tsx - full-screen story viewer with progress bar at top, tap to advance, swipe to skip user, pause on hold, reply input at bottom, seen indicator.
QuantNeon: Enhance apps/quantneon/src/pages/explore.tsx - add category tabs (For You, Travel, Food, Art, Fashion, Sports), masonry grid layout, search bar with suggestions, trending tags.

QuantNeon: Create apps/quantneon/src/pages/post-detail.tsx - full post view with image carousel (swipe dots), like/comment/share/bookmark bar, comments section with reply threads, double-tap to like animation, share sheet.

QuantNeon: Enhance apps/quantneon/src/pages/profile/[id].tsx - add profile header (avatar, name, bio, stats: posts/followers/following), follow/message buttons, tab bar (Posts/Reels/Tagged), post grid.
QuantNeon: Enhance apps/quantneon/src/pages/reels.tsx - vertical scroll reel player with sound toggle, like/comment/share/bookmark side actions, creator info overlay, progress bar.

QuantEdits: Enhance apps/quantedits/src/pages/editor.tsx - add full timeline editor with multiple tracks (video, audio, text, effects), playhead cursor, zoom controls, snap-to-grid, track resize handles.
QuantEdits: Create apps/quantedits/src/components/PreviewPlayer.tsx - video preview with play/pause, seek bar, frame-by-frame step, fullscreen toggle, loop toggle, playback speed selector.
QuantEdits: Create apps/quantedits/src/components/AssetLibrary.tsx - tabbed panel (Media, Music, Templates, Stickers, Effects, Transitions) with search, thumbnails, drag-to-timeline interaction.
QuantEdits: Enhance apps/quantedits/src/pages/export.tsx - export settings: format (MP4, MOV, WebM, GIF), quality (1080p, 720p, 480p), FPS (24, 30, 60), file size estimate, export progress bar.
QuantEdits: Create apps/quantedits/src/pages/projects-gallery.tsx - project cards with thumbnail preview, title, duration, last edited, delete/duplicate/share actions.
QuantMax: Enhance apps/quantmax/src/pages/index.tsx - vertical video feed with TikTok-style full-screen scroll, side action buttons (like, comment, share, bookmark, sound), creator info, sound badge.

QuantMax: Enhance apps/quantmax/src/pages/matching.tsx - swipe card stack with profile photos, name/age/distance, bio, shared interests badges, animated swipe left (X) / right (heart) / up (super like).

QuantMax: Enhance apps/quantmax/src/pages/videochat.tsx - random video chat with lobby (finding match animation), active call UI (local+remote video, timer, next/end buttons, report button), text chat alongside.
QuantMax: Create apps/quantmax/src/pages/profile-detail.tsx - content grid, follower count, verified badge, bio with links, tab bar (Videos/Likes/Playlists).
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck passes for quantneon, quantedits, quantmax
pnpm test passes for all affected apps
QuantNeon story viewer has progress bars and tap-to-advance
QuantEdits editor page has timeline with track types
QuantMax video feed has vertical scroll with side actions
All pages are accessible with proper aria labels
